parents.subject: LU-8056 build: announce linux kernel 4.5.7 support

commit.subject: LU-5070 mgs: fork/erase configuration
commit.message:
LU-5070 mgs: fork/erase configuration

Introuduce new lctl command to fork/erase the configuration for
the specified system. It can be used for rename filesystem name
in subsequent patch. Usage:

lctl fork_lcfg <fsname> <newname>
lctl erase_lcfg <fsname>

Signed-off-by: Fan Yong <fan.yong@intel.com>
Change-Id: I7475bd06f234fb919f0d96b228a5ecf0b81605a8
